zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Iorwerth ap Madog 8 Children於1205年之後出生在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利時，他的父親Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children8811歲，母親Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd8812歲。他於大約1242年與Gwerfyl verch Cynwrig在威爾士結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。他去世於1254年之後，埋葬在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾利安哈亞德--莫申南特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Iorwerth ap Madog 8 Children于1205年之后出生在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利时，他的父亲Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children8811岁，母亲Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd8812岁。他于大约1242年与Gwerfyl verch Cynwrig在威尔士结婚。他们至少是7个儿子的父母。他去世于1254年之后，埋葬在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾利安哈亞德--莫申南特。

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Madore
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Eusebe, Fernand, Lucien, Normand, Adhemar, Adrien, Donat, Elzear, Francois, Gaetan, Gilles.
French Canadian: from a French shortened form of the Spanish personal name Amador, from Latin Amator (from amator ‘lover’), a Christian saint's name. Compare Mador .
In some cases possibly also Breton (Madoré): nickname meaning literally ‘good help’, from Old Breton mat ‘good’ and uuoret ‘help’.

nameMeanings.name: Iorwerth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from iōr‘ ‘lord’ + a mutated form of berth ‘handsome’; borne in the Mabinogi by the jealous brother of Madawg , son of Maredudd . Iorwerth came to be regarded as a Welsh equivalent of Edward , but it has no actual connection with that name.

variants.name: Yorath
meanings: Anglicized form of   Iorwerth   or, in some cases, a transferred use of the surname derived from it.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Iorwerth ap Madog 8 Children was born after 1205, in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales, his father, Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children, was 8811 and his mother, Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd, was 8812. He married Gwerfyl verch Cynwrig about 1242, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. He died after 1254, and was buried in Llanrhaeadr-ym-Mochnant, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Iorwerth ap Madog 8 Children est né après 1205, à Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Galles, son père, Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children, avait 8811 ans et sa mère, Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd, avait 8812 ans. Il a épousé Gwerfyl verch Cynwrig environ 1242, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Il est décédé après 1254, et a été enterré à Llanrhaeadr-ym-Mochnant, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Iorwerth ap Madog 8 Children nach 1205 in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children 8811 und seine Mutter Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd 8812. Er hat um 1242 in Wales Gwerfyl verch Cynwrig geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne. Er starb nach 1254 und wurde in Llanrhaeadr-ym-Mochnant, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Iorwerth ap Madog 8 Children è nato il dopo il 1205 nel Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Galles, il suo padre, Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children, aveva 8811 anni e il suo madre, Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd, aveva 8812 anni. Lui sposato Gwerfyl verch Cynwrig circa 1242, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli. Morì dopo il 1254, e fu sepolto a Llanrhaeadr-ym-Mochnant, Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Iorwerth ap Madog 8 Childrenが1205年以後にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアモントゴメリーで生まれた時，父Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Childrenは8811歳，母Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdrydは8812歳であった。約1242年にウェールズでGwerfyl verch Cynwrigと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。彼は1254年以後に死去し，イギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアランルハエアドル-イム-モチナントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Iorwerth ap Madog 8 Children(이)가 1205년 이후 웨일스 몽고머이실르 몽고메리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children(은)는 8811세였고, 그의 어머니 Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd(은)는 8812세였다. 그는 대략 1242년 웨일스에서 Gwerfyl verch Cynwrig(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1254년 이후 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 랜하이아드-이-모ch난트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Iorwerth ap Madog 8 Children nasceu após 1205, em Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Gales, seu pai, Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children, tinha 8811 anos e sua mãe, Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd, tinha 8812 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwerfyl verch Cynwrig aproximadamente 1242, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos. Ele faleceu após 1254, e foi sepultado em Llanrhaeadr-ym-Mochnant, Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Iorwerth ap Madog 8 Children родился после 1205 г. в местности монтгомири, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children было 8811 год, а матери, которую звали Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd, 8812. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwerfyl verch Cynwrig около 1242 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Он умер после 1254 г. и был похоронен в местности лланраидр-им-мочнант, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Iorwerth ap Madog 8 Children nació después de 1205, en Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Gales, su papá, Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children, tenía 8811 años y su mamá, Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd, tenía 8812 años. Se casó con Gwerfyl verch Cynwrig aproximadamente 1242, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos. Murió después de 1254, y fue sepultado en Llanrhaeadr-ym-Mochnant, Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
